title: cardamine digitata var. sphenophylla
intro: Cardamine digitata var. sphenophylla, also known as the sphenophylla or two-lobed bittercress, is a variety of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of glucosinolates and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of sphenophylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Sphenophylla can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herb for various herbal applications.
